mapper.sql: CASE A.ONLINE_MNL_SE_CODE WHEN '01' THEN '사용자매뉴얼' WHEN '02' THEN '관리자매뉴얼' WHEN '03' THEN '설치매뉴얼' ELSE A.ONLINE_MNL_SE_CODE END

A.ONLINE_MNL_ID AS onlineMnlId, A.ONLINE_MNL_NM AS onlineMnlNm, A.ONLINE_MNL_SE_CODE AS onlineMnlSeCode, AS onlineMnlSeCodeNm, A.ONLINE_MNL_DFN AS onlineMnlDf, A.ONLINE_MNL_DC AS onlineMnlDc, A.FRST_REGISTER_ID AS frstRegisterId, TO_CHAR(A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS frstRegisterPnttm, (SELECT M.USER_NM FROM VW_USER_MASTER M WHERE M.ESNTL_ID = A.FRST_REGISTER_ID) AS frstRegisterNm
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM TB_ONLINE_MANUAL A WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_ONLINE_MANUAL A WHERE 1=1
SELECT FROM TB_ONLINE_MANUAL A WHERE A.ONLINE_MNL_ID = #{onlineMnlId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_ONLINE_MANUAL (ONLINE_MNL_ID, ONLINE_MNL_NM, ONLINE_MNL_SE_CODE, ONLINE_MNL_DFN, ONLINE_MNL_DC, FRST_REGISTER_ID, FRST_REGIST_PNTTM) VALUES (#{onlineMnlId}, #{onlineMnlNm}, #{onlineMnlSeCode}, #{onlineMnlDf}, #{onlineMnlDc}, #{frstRegisterId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
